tools.name: resolve_product_query
tools.description: Use this whenever a user asks about products, recommendations, prices, or availability. Use this instead of guessing or relying on stale knowledge.

query.description: Natural language product search query (e.g., 'best laptop for programming', 'cheap headphones under $50')

market.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g., 'US', 'SG'). Defaults to 'US' if not specified.

constraints.description: List of required features or constraints (e.g., ['16GB RAM', 'SSD', 'long battery life'])

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

tools.name: find_best_price
tools.description: Use this whenever a user asks where to buy something, what the cheapest price is, or where to find the best deal. Use this instead of guessing or relying on stale price data.

product.description: Product name or identifier (e.g., 'iPhone 15 Pro', 'Samsung Galaxy S24', 'product_id_123')

market.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g., 'US', 'SG'). Defaults to 'US'.

include_similar.description: Whether to include similar products in results when exact match is not available

tools.name: compare_products
tools.description: Use this whenever a user asks to compare products (A vs B, which is better, compare X and Y). Use this instead of guessing about product differences.

products.description: List of 2-10 product names or identifiers to compare (e.g., ['MacBook Pro 14', 'Dell XPS 15', 'iPhone 15 Pro'])

market.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g., 'US', 'SG'). Defaults to 'US'.

decision_criteria.description: What aspects to compare (e.g., ['price', 'rating', 'battery_life', 'features', 'weight']). If not specified, compares all available criteria.

buywhere.tools_description: BuyWhere tools for product resolution - recommend, compare, and find prices for products
